title: Reviewer rejected loop is recorded and can auto-remediate by policy
input_repo_state: Subagent workflow in progress with reviewer feedback.
user_request: Handle reviewer rejection and continue safely when low risk.
failure_signals: No distinction between low-risk and high-risk fixes
Workflow stops or over-applies without policy

assertions.includes: 只有 `risk_level=low`、`operation_risk` 不高于 `reversible-write`，且 `action_type` 在自动执行白名单内的项默认自动修复
